PushEvent:yasyf/captain-hook.summary: deferral gate now scans thinking and tool payloads across the whole turn (pack 0.5.0)

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-context.summary: integrated ccx exec across the docs, guard pack, and plugin (v0.4.0)

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-notes.summary: migrated hooks off the removed captain_hook.command module onto cc_transcript.command

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-present.summary: gated web toasts on the SSE caught-up marker, dropping the replay-heuristic timer

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-skills.summary: added the /show surface-dispatch skill and dropped the ccx repo-pin (cc-context attaches it now)

PushEvent:yasyf/cookiesync.summary: doctor now treats a locked keybag as healthy; unreachable peers log once per outage

PushEvent:yasyf/fusekit.summary: mux Teardown grew a legacy per-dir arm so real-dir rows tear down via the pre-mux path

PushEvent:yasyf/reposync.summary: pinned synckit v0.8.0 so unreachable peers log once per outage, not every pass

PushEvent:yasyf/synckit.summary: added a per-peer circuit breaker on the watch-notify path with tailnet snapshots

PushEvent:yasyf/yclaw.summary: slimmed the macOS guests to essential services (aggressive metal disables ~55 launchd jobs)

captain-hook@v8.3.0.summary: plugins ship their capt-hook pack via session attach + canonical dispatch, collapsing double-dispatch

cc-pool@v0.38.0.summary: single-mount mux cutover: one native NFS mount for the whole pool (consumes fusekit v0.29.0)

fusekit@v0.29.1.summary: mux Teardown grew a legacy per-dir arm so real-dir rows tear down via the pre-mux path

spawnllm@v0.5.4.summary: seeded isolated runs from the config home with a Keychain fallback
